reviews.comment:
Muy chico el espacio , no tiene wi fi , los baños antiguos pero limpios , un parque muy lindo y calculo que los sandwich mas grandes y ricos de toda la ruta 3 y en precio

(Translated by Google)
The place is very small, there's no Wi-Fi, the bathrooms are old but clean, it has a very nice park, and I reckon they have the biggest and tastiest sandwiches on all of Route 3, and at a great price.

reviews.comment:
Excelente parador para socios y no socios. Baños limpios y buen lugar arbolado para descansar, comer, bajar con los chicos o con las mascotas. También es posible consumir dentro del lugar, venden productos regionales. Imperdibles sus sándwiches! Sobre todo el dr jamón crudo que fue premiado. En la ruta 3 sobre la mano derecha. Cerca de San Miguel del Monte, camino a Tandil, Azul, etcétera. Para socios 5% de descuento.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent rest stop for members and non-members alike. Clean restrooms and a lovely shady area to relax, eat, or take the kids or pets out. You can also eat on-site; they sell regional products. Their sandwiches are a must-try! Especially the award-winning prosciutto sandwich. Located on Route 3 on the right-hand side. Near San Miguel del Monte, on the way to Tandil, Azul, and other destinations. Members receive a 5% discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSZ1lDQWtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA de Gorch es una experiencia para todos los viajeros y viajeras de la Ruta 3.
Buenos baños, un lugar para estirar las piernas y comer un CLÁSICO sanguche elaborado en la cafetería.
No dejes de pedir el de matambre o el de jamón crudo. NO HAY NADA IGUAL.

(Translated by Google)
Gorch's ACA is an experience for all Route 3 travelers.
Great restrooms, a place to stretch your legs, and a classic sandwich made at the cafeteria.
Be sure to order the matambre or the raw ham sandwich. THERE'S NOTHING LIKE IT.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSNU9iOWdRRRAB
